guide_lib.book.deconstructor.desc:
Crafting and usage for deconstructors
and the enchantment manager
guide_lib.deconstructor.page.overview.p1:
Deconstructor adds machines that reverse crafted items
into materials and a book-based enchantment manager.
guide_lib.deconstructor.page.overview.p2:
Use the table of contents for machine recipes and usage.
See Getting the Guides for manual and Codex Tablet crafting.
guide_lib.deconstructor.page.guide_items:
Craft the Deconstructor Manual from a book and a crafting table.
Right-click to open this guide directly
(not via the Codex list).

Craft the Codex Tablet from a written book, redstone, and glass pane.
Opens the tablet UI listing all mod guides
(requires guide_lib).
guide_lib.deconstructor.page.deconstruct:
The basic deconstructor reverses a crafting recipe
and lets you take one preview slot of materials.

Place one item in the input slot to preview materials.
Taking output consumes the input item.
Shift-click moves matching preview stacks (max one slot).
guide_lib.deconstructor.page.precision_d:
An upgraded deconstructor that allows
up to three preview slots to be collected.

Works like the basic deconstructor,
but you can collect up to three slots.
Useful when a recipe yields multiple ingredients.
guide_lib.deconstructor.page.enchant_man:
Uses books to extract, split, merge, and apply enchantments.
No experience cost.

Slot 0: input 1
Slot 1: input 2 (book, etc.)
Slot 2: output
Taking output consumes or transforms the inputs.
guide_lib.deconstructor.page.enchant_ope:
[Extract]
Enchanted item in slot 0, regular book in slot 1.
Taking the enchanted book removes all enchantments
and repair cost from the source item.

[Split]
Multi-enchant book in slot 0, regular book in slot 1.
Moves the first enchantment into a separate book.

[Merge]
Enchanted books in slots 0 and 1.
Same enchant type levels up by 1 (up to max),
otherwise merges both.

[Apply]
Item in slot 0, enchanted book in slot 1.
Taking output applies the enchantment
and turns the book back into a regular book.
deconstructor.configuration.title: Deconstructor Configuration
deconstructor.configuration.excludedItem: Comma- or space-separated item IDs that cannot be deconstructed (e.g. minecraft:netherite_sword). Changes reload the recipe index.
